message:
fix(mux): fix PBO resize race condition causing static noise

- Hard reset PBOs on dimension change (delete + gen + alloc inline)
- Return false immediately after reset to force sync fallback
- Add glFinish() before mapping to ensure async write completes
- Set GL_PACK_ROW_LENGTH before mapping for driver compatibility

Fixes static noise artifacts that appeared when splitting or resizing
terminal panes.
